title: Ally Aura Pro Wireless Noise Cancelling Over-Ear Headphones, Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation, 40-Hour Battery, Bluetooth 5.3, Memory Foam Earcups, Black
bullets: HYBRID ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION: Six microphones detect and cancel up to 30dB of ambient noise across commutes, offices, and flights.|40-HOUR BATTERY LIFE: All-week listening on a single charge; a 10-minute quick charge delivers 5 hours of playback.|BLUETOOTH 5.3 + MULTIPOINT: Connect to two devices simultaneously and switch seamlessly between phone and laptop.|STUDIO-TUNED 40MM DRIVERS: Custom-tuned dynamic drivers deliver balanced lows, clear mids, and crisp highs across genres.|PREMIUM COMFORT: Plush memory foam earcups and a lightweight 250g aluminum frame designed for all-day wear.
description: Engineered for focus on the go, the Ally Aura Pro pairs hybrid active noise cancellation with studio-tuned 40mm drivers to deliver a quiet, immersive listening experience anywhere you take them. Switch between your phone and laptop with Bluetooth 5.3 Multipoint, settle into plush memory foam earcups designed for all-day comfort, and travel light with 40 hours of battery in a 250g frame. In the box: headphones, hard-shell travel case, 3.5mm aux cable, USB-C charging cable, and a 2-year warranty.

title: Ally Pulse True Wireless Earbuds with Active Noise Cancellation, 32-Hour Battery with Charging Case, IPX5 Sweat Resistant, Bluetooth 5.3, Wireless Charging, Midnight Black
bullets: ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION + TRANSPARENCY: Tap to switch between ANC for focus and transparency mode for quick conversations.|32-HOUR TOTAL BATTERY: 8 hours per charge in the buds, plus 3 additional charges from the wireless charging case.|IPX5 SWEAT & WATER RESISTANCE: Rated for workouts, runs, and rainy commutes.|BLUETOOTH 5.3 LOW LATENCY: Stable connection with under 60ms latency for video and mobile gaming.|CUSTOM EQ IN THE ALLY APP: Tune sound profiles, find your earbuds, and customize tap controls.
description: The Ally Pulse earbuds deliver studio-clear sound in a pocket-sized form factor. Hybrid ANC adapts to your environment, while a snug ergonomic fit (with four ear tip sizes included) keeps them secure during workouts and commutes alike. Pair instantly with any Bluetooth 5.3 device, charge wirelessly, and customize your sound through the free Ally companion app. Includes USB-C cable, four ear tip sizes (XS/S/M/L), and a 1-year warranty.

title: Ally Glide Wireless On-Ear Headphones - Bluetooth, Lightweight, 24 Hour Battery
bullets: Wireless Bluetooth connection for easy pairing with phones and laptops.|24 hour battery life for long commutes and travel days.|Lightweight on-ear design that folds for portability.|Built-in microphone for hands-free calls.
description: The Ally Glide is a comfortable wireless on-ear headphone designed for everyday commuters. Lightweight build, soft earcups, and a folding hinge make them easy to take with you anywhere.

title: Ally Dash Sport Earbuds
bullets: Great for running and the gym.|Sweat resistant.|Long battery life.
description: Ally Dash sport earbuds are made for active people. Comfortable fit and good sound.

title: Ally Studio 50 Headphones
bullets: Studio sound.|Wired connection.|Comfortable for long sessions.
description: Professional-style wired headphones for studio use and home listening.

title: Ally Little Listener Kids Headphones - 85dB Volume Limit, Wired, Blue
bullets: 85dB volume limit to help protect young ears.|Cushioned earcups sized for kids ages 3-12.|Durable, tangle-resistant wired cable.|Adjustable headband fits a range of head sizes.
description: Ally Little Listener headphones are designed for children with a built-in 85dB volume limiter, soft cushioned earcups, and a durable wired connection. A safe, simple option for tablets, in-car entertainment, and online learning.
